description: Simulated user tries to book for 12 people. Agent should reject and direct to events team.
evaluationDatasets: Bella Notte Slot Machine - Full Suite

scenario.task: Try to make a dinner reservation for 12 people at Bella Notte.
rubrics: The agent must inform the user that reservations are limited to parties of 1-8.
The agent must provide the events team contact email: events@bellanotte.com.
The agent should not proceed with collecting other reservation details.
